---
name: release-publish
description: Publish a Bowties draft release by gathering release notes, checking docs status, and either using GitHub CLI or handing off a precise GitHub UI checklist.
argument-hint: Optional version or tag, for example 0.2.0 or v0.2.0
agent: release-publish
---

Publish a Bowties release following [docs/project/releasing.md](../../docs/project/releasing.md).
